title: psidium haitiense
intro: Psidium haitiense, also known as Haitian strawberry guava, is a species of flowering plant in the myrtle family, native to the Caribbean island of Haiti. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders. Herbal preparations of Psidium haitiense are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and immune function.
